title: Protection Enchantments Overhaul
description: Reworks protection enchantments to make it lean toward specialization unlike vanilla protection enchantment.
body:
Overhauling all protection enchantments and adding new one to make the game balanced



**Features added and changed:**

🔰 Physical Protection (replaces vanilla protection)

- Applies only to physical hits (melee damage, fall damage).

- Default: 5.25% per level.

- Caps at 75% total reduction.

- Items with Physical Protection can’t be destroyed by cactus when dropped.



🔥 Fire Protection

- Reduces fire, lava, and burning damage.

- Default: 6.25% per level, max 87%.

- Items with Fire Protection are immune to being destroyed by fire/lava.



💥 Blast Protection

- Reduces explosion damage (creepers, TNT, beds, respawn anchors).

- Default: 6% per level, max 85%.

- Items with Blast Protection can’t be destroyed by explosions.
  

🏹 Projectile Protection

- Reduces arrow, trident, ghast fireball, and other projectile damage.
- Projectile Protection II (+) will ricochet, higher level = higher damage.

- Default: 5.5% per level, max 78%.



🧙 Magic Protection (new enchantment)

- Protects against magic damage: Instant Damage potions, Wither skulls, Evoker fangs, etc.

- Default: 6% per level, capped at 80%.

- Registers like a vanilla enchant


Note: This mod is kinda unbalanced, you can change whatever you want in the config.

> (Mod probably vanilla friendly)
